code:
import io
import string
import list

fn parse_ints(_ s: String) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  let n = string.len(s)
  mut i = 0
  mut current = ""
  mut in_num = false
  while i <= n
    mut is_ws = true
    mut byte_val = 0
    if i < n
      match string.byte_at(s, i)
      when Some(b)
        if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
          is_ws = true
        else
          is_ws = false
          byte_val = b
        end
      when None
        is_ws = true
      end
    end
    if is_ws
      if in_num
        match string.parse_int(current)
        when Some(v)
          result = list.push(result, v)
        when None
          ()
        end
        current = ""
        in_num = false
      end
    else
      in_num = true
      current = "#{current}#{string.from_byte(byte_val)}"
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  result
end

fn read_line_or_empty() -> String
  match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end
end

fn main() -> Unit
  let line1 = read_line_or_empty()
  let line2 = read_line_or_empty()
  let xs = parse_ints(line1)
  let ys = parse_ints(line2)
  let n = xs.len()
  mut i = 0
  while i < n
    match xs.get(i)
    when Some(x)
      match ys.get(i)
      when Some(y)
        let s = x + y
        println("#{x}+#{y}=#{s}")
      when None
        ()
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
end
